extract: Three Isle Path (Japanese: ３のしま よこあな Island 3 Tunnel) is a small underground passage located in the Sevii Islands archipelago. Initially a cave famous as a source of gold, this location is gradually expanded into a tunnel over the course of Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen. Once completed, the tunnel leads to an isolated patch of grass where wild Dunsparce can be caught. The cave itself houses no wild Pokémon.
